reproductive-rights.summary: Opposes abortion access and voted against codifying Roe v. Wade.

lgbtq-rights.summary: Voted against the Respect for Marriage Act and opposes the Equality Act.

voting-rights.summary: Opposed the For the People Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Act, citing federal overreach.

taxes-and-spending.summary: Strong advocate for the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act and reducing federal spending.

labor-and-unions.summary: Opposes the PRO Act and generally sides with business over union interests.
